task_completion.description: Generate NACA 0021 airfoil and its 360-degree extrapolated polar at Re=300,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing 'NACA 0021' in the airfoil list, XFoil Direct Analysis module with Re set to 300,000 and AoA range -10 to 20, and the 360-degree Polar Extrapolation module being used.

task_completion.description: Design the 3-bladed H-Darrieus VAWT rotor with specified dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VAWT Rotor Design module in QBlade showing 3 blades, a rotor radius of 1.5 m, a blade height of 3.0 m, and a blade chord of 0.2 m.

task_completion.description: Set up the Double Multiple Streamtube (DMS) simulation with correct wind speed and TSR range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VAWT Simulation module showing DMS selected, wind speed set to 8 m/s, and the Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) range configured from 0.5 to 5.0.

task_completion.description: Run the simulation and view the performance graphs (Torque/Cp vs TSR).
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade displaying simulation results, specifically graphs or tables showing Power Coefficient (Cp) or Torque (Cq) plotted against TSR.

task_completion.description: Save the QBlade project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the QBlade main window title bar showing the project saved as 'vawt_selfstart.wpa' in the '/home/ga/Documents/projects/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the final report with the self-starting assessment and calculated values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file 'vawt_selfstart_report.txt' containing a YES/NO self-starting assessment, lowest positive torque TSR, optimal TSR, maximum Cp, and a calculated rotor solidity of approximately 0.0637.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the QBlade GUI to perform the design and simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QBlade application open with active interaction in its various modules (Airfoil, Rotor Design, Simulation), rather than just terminal commands mocking the output files.

integrity.description: Verify the values in the report are derived from the simulation rather than hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The optimal TSR, max Cp, and lowest positive torque TSR written in the text report should visually correspond to the peaks and zero-crossings seen in the QBlade simulation graphs.

integrity.description: Verify the report file was manually created and edited by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor (like nano, gedit, or vim) open with the agent typing or formatting the required assessment values into 'vawt_selfstart_report.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The calculated rotor solidity (N*c / (2*pi*R)) must be approximately 0.0637 (3 * 0.2 / (2 * 3.14159 * 1.5)). Plausible physics ranges for the simulation results: Maximum Cp should be between 0.1 and 0.55, and Optimal TSR should be between 1.5 and 5.0. The turbine is considered self-starting (YES) if the torque graph shows positive values at any TSR strictly less than 1.0.
